channel.title: Home on Julián Santiago
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Julián Santiago

item.title: Curriculum vitae
item.description: You can download my CV in PDF format here.

item.title: Outreach
item.description: Articles Santiago J, Álvarez Praino V. (2024) The journey of the cauquenes: Great adventurers from Tierra del Fuego. La Lupa 24, 16-21, 2796-7360. Read online or read in PDF [Spanish] Interactive experiences Biology Week, University of Buenos Aires - Faculty event aimed at secondary schools (2025 - 2023) Co-presented twice the marine biology workshop ”Discovering the Sea Floor”. For the 2025 edition, designed the original workshop “Scientific Drawing: From Ink to Pixels”.

item.title: Publications & conferences
item.description: Book chapters and research articles Chiesa IL, Pereira E, Calderón López S, Santiago J, Doti B (2026) Chapter 7, Marine isopods and amphipods (Crustacea: Peracarida) recorded from Isla de los Estados and surrounding waters. In: Biodiversity and Conservation of Isla de los Estados (Chuanisin) - A XXI Century Terra Incognita. Raya Rey A, Balza U (Eds). Springer Nature. Santiago J, Pereira E (2026) A new isopod species of the genus Edotia (Valvifera, Idoteidae) from Argentina, with a key to South American species.

item.title: Teaching
item.description: 2025 Introduction to Botany, Biology, FCEyN, UBA. Undergraduate teaching assistant. 10 weekly hours. Biodiversity and Experimental Biology Department. University of Buenos Aires. 2024 Biometry, Biology, FCEyN, UBA. Undergraduate teaching assistant. 10 weekly hours. Ecology, Genetics and Evolution Department. University of Buenos Aires. 2022 Mathematics, University Support Programme, FFyL, UBA. Volunteer tutor. 4 weekly hours. Centre for Innovation and Development for Community Action. University of Buenos Aires Biology, University Support Programme, FFyL, UBA.
